title: Over 900 Oracle E-Business instances exposed to ongoing attacks
summary: Over 900 Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) instances have been found exposed online amid ongoing attacks exploiting a critical security flaw. [...]

title: Microsoft fixes GIF functionality in the Windows Emoji Panel
summary: Microsoft has fixed the GIF functionality in the Emoji Panel for Windows 11 users after the provider shut down its service. [...]

title: Amazon fined $2.25M for withholding evidence from fraud victims
summary: The U.S. Federal Trade Commission (FTC) says Amazon will pay a $2.25 million civil penalty to settle charges that it blocked identity theft victims' access to transaction records. [...]

title: Adobe patches seven max severity ColdFusion, Campaign flaws
summary: Adobe has released security patches for seven maximum-severity vulnerabilities in the ColdFusion web app development platform and the Campaign Classic marketing automation platform. [...]

title: Anthropic to restore Claude Fable access on Wednesday
summary: Anthropic has confirmed that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude's two most powerful models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5. [...]

title: Anthropic rolls out Sonnet 5 with near-Opus 4.8 performance at a lower price
summary: Anthropic is now rolling out Sonnet 5, and it's almost as good as the Opus range, but it is designed to be cheaper than the company's flagship model. [...]

title: New BioShocking attack manipulates AI browser into data theft
summary: A new prompt injection attack dubbed "BioShocking" could trick AI-powered browsers into treating real-world risky actions as part of a fictional scenario, causing them to ignore any safety guardrails. [...]

title: Microsoft accelerates quantum-safe roadmap as risks grow
summary: Microsoft announced today that it is accelerating its quantum-safe security roadmap, saying advances in quantum computing are bringing the need to replace today's encryption standards sooner than previously expected. [...]

title: Malicious PyPI packages give hackers control of Telegram bot servers
summary: A campaign active since last November has been targeting Python developers building Telegram bots with trojanized Pyrogram forks that allow attackers to read arbitrary files on compromised servers. [...]

title: Fake Perplexity extension on Chrome Web Store tracked searches
summary: A malicious extension in the Chrome Web Store is masquerading as the Perplexity AI answer engine, intercepting search traffic and collecting browsing information. [...]

title: Lessons from the Underground: How to Combat Business Email Compromise
summary: Business Email Compromise is more than an email scam. It's a coordinated operation involving compromised accounts, financial research, and cash-out networks. Flare explores how underground forums reveal how BEC attacks are planned and executed. [...]

title: Insurance giant Aflac discloses data breach after subsidiary hack
summary: American insurance giant Aflac has disclosed a new data breach after attackers breached its Japan subsidiary's systems and stole personal and bank account information of 4.38 million customers. [...]

title: Microsoft adds smarter bot protection to Teams meetings
summary: Microsoft has introduced a new Teams admin policy that allows organizers to prevent third-party bots from joining meetings without approval. [...]

title: Kali Linux 2026.2 released with 9 new tools, NetHunter updates
summary: Kali Linux 2026.2, the second release of the year, is now available for download, featuring 9 new tools and numerous Kali NetHunter improvements. [...]

title: Blackfield ransomware asks Nidec Corporation for $2 million ransom
summary: The Blackfield ransomware gang is asking for a $2 million ransom from Nidec Corporation, a large Japanese manufacturer of electronic components for automotive and computing applications. [...]
